features.featureTitle: In HeroSection.tsx, update the text of the second CTA button (the animated 'Join Now' fire-style button) so that it reads 'Join Now For Tournament'. The element is identified by XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[2]/a[2]/span[4]/span[1]. Only the visible label text should change; all existing animations, styles, and structure must remain intact.
